message:
fix(anthropic): use index-addressed blocks in streaming assembler

Refactor streaming block accumulator to address blocks by explicit
index field instead of always appending to the last block. Fixes
incorrect assembly when Anthropic interleaves content_block events
across multiple indices. Add closed flag per block, strict type-
checking on deltas, and helper functions (block_slot, stop_reason_value,
parse_tool_input_json). Move SSE event processing before buffer
overflow check to prevent silent event discard at boundary.

Add integration test for interleaved block indices.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
